body_txt: A character's entire body is covered in hundreds of scars. This trope is used to show that the character is a badass, a veteran, or a Broken Bird who lived through a lot of fights or suffered a great deal of pain and torture . Often times these scars will be linked to mental scars related to how they gained them. Compare Scarred Back Reveal , with which it may overlap. If the scars are self-inflicted, expect the character to be more than a little off . Subtrope of Rugged Scar . Related to Dented Iron , Good Scars, Evil Scars , Every Scar Has a Story , and Scars Are Forever . May involve a Scar Survey . See also Frozen Face . One of the many injury types that qualifies as Climactic Maiming .
